copyCore.note: Copy only after Store names and tests are neutralized.
Copy request rendering and assertions after removing domain defaults.
Copy shared templates after replacing product and domain text.

copyLater.note: Needs profile loader boundary before copying.
Use as CLI behavior reference, not as final command name.

profileOnly.note: Export into profiles/scf-chain through a command.
Keep as SCF profile Docker material, not core Compose.
